title: RAPTOR: Recursive Abstractive Processing for Tree-Organized Retrieval

defines.name: RAPTOR
defines.definition: A retrieval and indexing system that recursively embeds, clusters, and summarizes text chunks into a tree of multi-level abstractions for retrieval-augmented generation.

problem: Standard retrieval-augmented methods retrieve only short contiguous chunks, which limits their ability to capture large-scale document structure and answer questions requiring broader context.
